column1: # firmware-h2 partition table — MINIMUM SAFE OTA (single OTA slot + recovery).
# Not a dual-bank (ota_0/ota_1) scheme. One updatable slot (ota_0) plus an
# immutable `factory` golden image:
#   - The C6 flashes a new H2 image into ota_0 over UART (ROM-bootloader
#     passthrough) and points otadata at it
#   - If an update is interrupted / ota_0 is invalid
#     to the factory image. That fallback is the "safe" — the H2 always has a
#     known-good app to boot
column2: on top of the unbrickable ROM download mode.

column1: # Also carries zb_storage / zb_fct for the esp-zigbee (ZBOSS) NV state.
# Fits the 2 MB flash: app is ~0x97e00 (622 KB) vs the 0xF0000 (960 KB) slots
# ~338 KB headroom each; top 0xBC00 (~47 KB) free.
# When a full dual-bank scheme is wanted later
# H2-MINI-1-N4 actually has and split into ota_0/ota_1.
# Name
nvs
otadata
phy_init
factory
ota_0
zb_storage
zb_fct
